releases.author: kocheck
releases.description:
# Release Notes - v1.0.3

## 🚀 What's Changed

* **Improved Figma Embedding Logic**: The plugin now intelligently determines which Figma links should be embedded using pattern matching
  * Only URLs that match embeddable content patterns will be converted to embeds
  * Regular Figma links (like pricing pages or documentation) remain as clickable links

* **Support for More Figma Content Types**:
  * Design files (`/file/`, `/design/`)
  * Prototypes (`/proto/`)
  * FigJam boards (`/board/`)
  * Slides & Decks (`/slides/`, `/deck/`)
  * Figma Buzz (`/buzz/`)
  * Figma Sites (`/site/`)

* **Enhanced Embed Appearance**:
  * Responsive width (100%)
  * Appropriate height (450px)
  * Cleaner look with no borders
  * Full-screen viewing support

* **Performance Improvements**:
  * More selective embedding reduces unnecessary iframe loading
  * Better overall note performance when multiple Figma links are present

## 🧑‍💻 Contributors

* @pontuskarlsson made their first contribution with the pattern-based conditional embed implementation in [PR #3](https://github.com/kocheck/obsidian-figma-viewer/pull/3)

## 📝 Full Changelog

[View changes between v1.0.2 and v1.0.3](https://github.com/kocheck/obsidian-figma-viewer/compare/1.0.2...1.0.3)

releases.author: kocheck
releases.description:
# Obsidian Figma Embed Plugin v1.0.2 - Release Notes

Excited to announce the first release of the Obsidian Figma Embed Plugin! This plugin allows you to integrate Figma designs into your Obsidian notes, enhancing workflow and making your notes more visual and interactive.

We updated our manifest to point to the correct Repo as well. 

## 🎉 New Features

- **Automatic Figma Embedding**: The plugin now automatically converts Figma links pasted into your notes into interactive, inline previews.
- **Seamless Integration**: Works directly within your Obsidian markdown files without any additional steps required.
- **Real-time Updates**: Embedded Figma previews update automatically when changes are made in the original Figma file.

## 🔧 How It Works

1. Copy a Figma link (e.g., https://www.figma.com/file/...)
2. Paste the link into your Obsidian note.
3. The plugin automatically converts the link into an embedded preview when viewing your markdown file.


## 🐛 Known Issues

- Large Figma files may take a moment to load within Obsidian.
- Figma prototypes with complex interactions may have limited functionality in the embed view.

## 🔜 Coming Soon

We're already working on exciting new features for future releases, including:

- Customizable embed sizes
- Option to toggle between link and embed view


## 🙏 Feedback and Support

Your feedback is crucial in helping us improve the plugin. If you encounter any issues or have suggestions for improvements, please don't hesitate to:

- Open an issue on our [GitHub repository](https://github.com/yourusername/obsidian-figma-embed)
releases.name: v1.0.2
